anchor_name: Ripasudil corneal-endothelium repurposing — Robin case study
source: Robin (drug-repurposing AI agent) published case study
description: ROCK inhibitor ripasudil identified for corneal endothelial dysfunction via cross-tissue mechanism mapping; regression target = OPL Wave can surface ROCK-inhibitor class given a hypothesis seed about corneal endothelial cells.
expected_emergent_concepts: drug repurposing from glaucoma to corneal disease
acceptance_criterion: Aviv (MoA) + Ted (translational) co-surface ROCK inhibitor class with traceable PMID chain.
